judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent formed a correct approach (filter NYSE non-ETF from stockinfo, intersect with available price tables, compute 2017 up/down day counts) but repeatedly failed to construct valid batched SQL UNION strings in execute_python (multiple "SyntaxError: unterminated string literal" and related errors), then stopped and returned an inability message instead of completing the computation and selecting the top 5 names.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s final result was derived from a query_db call (var_call_iwFyOgFOPCxeG79BpEtC4EFe) that manually UNIONed only a small subset of symbols (explicitly “-- TRUNCATED FOR BREVITY”), so the “top 5” were chosen from incomplete data, and the subsequent execute_python name extraction produced a malformed company name (e.g., “Black Hills Corporation generates and delivers electricity and natural gas”).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
